results.evidence: RegexEdgeExtractor handles #123, owner/repo#456, GitHub URLs, and closing keywords. Tests in extractor.test.ts cover all formats.
HeuristicEdgeExtractor.#extractSlackPermalinks catches Slack permalinks. Tests in heuristic.test.ts:21-42.
RegexEdgeExtractor.extractUrlReferences handles GitHub URLs; HeuristicEdgeExtractor.#extractMarkdownLinks handles non-GitHub markdown links. Both tested.
RegexEdgeExtractor: 1.0 explicit, 0.5 inferred. HeuristicEdgeExtractor: 0.85 Slack/Jira, 0.8 markdown. mergeEdges adds 0.05 boost per agreeing extractor.
Default pipeline uses RegexEdgeExtractor + HeuristicEdgeExtractor + CodeEdgeExtractor, all local. LLM/TreeSitter are conditional opt-in only.
All spec description ACs satisfied. CompositeEdgeExtractor orchestrates regex+heuristic+code extractors with merge/dedup in packages/ingest/src/edges/.
181 tests pass across 13 test files in packages/ingest/src/edges/. Test coverage includes extractor.test.ts, heuristic.test.ts, composite.test.ts, code.test.ts.
